mapper.insert: insert into class_info(class_code, class_name, grade, entry_year, school_year, status, remark, create_time) values(#{classCode}, #{className}, #{grade}, #{entryYear}, #{schoolYear}, #{status}, #{remark}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update class_info set grade = grade + 1 where grade < 3 and status = '0'
